testcase.name: test_01_create_fresh_submission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_approval_flow.py:65: in test_01_create_fresh_submission assert response.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create submission: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create submission: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","checklist"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"milestone_key":"design_meeting_2","checklist_items":[{"item_id":"floor_plan_finalized","completed":true,"notes":"Floor plan complete"},{"item_id":"3d_renders_ready","completed":true,"notes":"3D renders ready"},{"item_id":"material_palette_selected","completed":true,"notes":"Materials selected"},{"item_id":"budget_aligned","completed":true,"notes":"Budget aligned"},{"item_id":"scope_coverage_complete","completed":true,"notes":"All areas covered"},{"item_id":"client_requirements_addressed","completed":true,"notes":"Requirements addressed"}],"files":[{"filename":"test_design.pdf","url":"https://example.com/test.pdf"}],"notes":"Full flow test submission - 2026-02-09T15:44:37.646994"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","design_notes"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"milestone_key":"design_meeting_2","checklist_items":[{"item_id":"floor_plan_finalized","completed":true,"notes":"Floor plan complete"},{"item_id":"3d_renders_ready","completed":true,"notes":"3D renders ready"},{"item_id":"material_palette_selected","completed":true,"notes":"Materials selected"},{"item_id":"budget_aligned","completed":true,"notes":"Budget aligned"},{"item_id":"scope_coverage_complete","completed":true,"notes":"All areas covered"},{"item_id":"client_requirements_addressed","completed":true,"notes":"Requirements addressed"}],"files":[{"filename":"test_design.pdf","url":"https://example.com/test.pdf"}],"notes":"Full flow test submission - 2026-02-09T15:44:37.646994"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 201 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_02_verify_submission_in_review_queue

failure.message: AssertionError: Submission None not found in review queue assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_approval_flow.py:100: in test_02_verify_submission_in_review_queue assert found, f"Submission {TestFullDesignApprovalFlow.test_submission_id} not found in review queue" E AssertionError: Submission None not found in review queue E assert False

testcase.name: test_03_approve_submission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_approval_flow.py:115: in test_03_approve_submission assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to approve submission: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to approve submission: {"detail":"Submission not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_04_verify_approved_status
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_approval_flow.py:131: in test_04_verify_approved_status assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get submission: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get submission: {"detail":"Submission not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
